---
title: "All my favorite resources!"
---


<h1>This is an h1 element</h1>

<h1 class="title">This is also an h1 element of class title</h1>

<p>this is a paragraph element (body text)</p>

<p class="title">this is body text of class title</p>


---

<p class="orange-text">This paragraph is orange</p>

<p class="center-text">This paragraph is centered</p>

<h3 class="center-text orange-text">This level-3 header is centered and orange</h3>

---

[Here is some text which is orange]{.orange-text}

::: {.center-text}
This whole section will be orange.

[Which includes this line as well]{.orange-text}

## and this header
:::
